projectDescription: Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) Python tool for automating Cisco switch configuration across multiple branch networks with security, QoS, VLANs, and GRE/IPsec tunneling
keyFeatures: Automated multi-branch Cisco IOS configuration via SSH (Netmiko)
VLAN segmentation with DHCP pools and access control lists (ACLs)
Quality of Service (QoS) with MQC class-maps and policy-maps
GRE over IPsec tunneling with IKEv1 and ESP-AES-256 encryption
Device security hardening (enable secret, login block-for, banner MOTD)
AWS S3 backup integration with AES256 server-side encryption
Automatic Layer 2/Layer 3 detection with smart config generation
Protected uplink interface (GigabitEthernet0/0) to prevent lockout
publicApiSurface: build_commands() - Generate IOS commands from configuration
run_on_switch() - Execute configuration on a switch via SSH
test_connection() - Test SSH connectivity and detect L2/L3
detect_l3() - Detect if switch has ip routing enabled
expand_ports() - Normalize interface names to full IOS format
